description: CompositionOrange round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Don this orange tee from tantra and declare to the world that the queen of Cool has arrived! Advertise your cool attitude in this comfortable t-shirt with style. Pair it with jeans, shorts or capris, and stay cool.
